architectureVision.statement: Enable Mambu through an integrated enterprise architecture spanning business, application, data, and technology domains.
drivers: Reduce fragmentation across organizational and technology change.
Make dependencies and ownership explicit across architecture layers.
Improve governance of strategic change and target-state decisions.

goals.name: 2026-Q1 General Manager of Digital Lending outcome goal
goals.description: Improve Lending Product Launch Velocity for General Manager of Digital Lending by advancing rapid launch capability with servicing control through configurable lending products, partner connectivity, and automated servicing basics.

goals.name: 2026-Q1 VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS outcome goal
goals.description: Improve Partner Go-Live Time for VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS by advancing partner launch repeatability through tenant setup, public apis, and operational controls that reduce time-to-live for new programs.

goals.name: 2026-Q2 General Manager of Digital Lending outcome goal
goals.description: Prepare to improve Lending Product Launch Velocity for General Manager of Digital Lending by advancing rapid launch capability with servicing control through configurable lending products, partner connectivity, and automated servicing basics.

goals.name: 2026-Q2 VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS outcome goal
goals.description: Prepare to improve Partner Go-Live Time for VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS by advancing partner launch repeatability through tenant setup, public apis, and operational controls that reduce time-to-live for new programs.

principles: Business capabilities drive application and technology design.
Information is modeled as a shared enterprise asset.
Technology choices should be standardized unless a domain-specific need justifies variation.
Implementation should be governed against explicit target and transition architectures.

stakeholders.name: Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive
stakeholders.concern: Senior executive at a retail bank, regional bank, building society, or credit union responsible for replacing legacy core constraints with a modern, scalable banking platform across deposits, lending, and payments while managing regulatory, migration, and profitability risk.

stakeholders.name: General Manager of Digital Lending
stakeholders.concern: Commercial and product leader at a lender, digital bank, or consumer-finance provider responsible for launching and scaling loan products profitably across underwriting, servicing, collections, and channel partnerships.

stakeholders.name: VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS
stakeholders.concern: Product and platform executive at a fintech, Banking-as-a-Service provider, or embedded-finance platform responsible for enabling partners to launch regulated financial products through APIs while balancing speed, configurability, and operational control.
